description: PR-mined but intentionally cumulative (JunkFood02/Seal, pin through commit f635f69e, "fix(download): use original url of playlists"): VideoInfo.kt's real, unsquashed growth across ~11 months -- new fields (uploaderId, subtitles, requestedDownloads, filename, ...), width/height widened to Double, and new data classes (RequestedDownload, SubtitleFormat) -- rather than a single isolated PR, since this file's real edit history doesn't isolate that cleanly. Generous recompile bounds reflect the file's ~10 top-level declarations.
